description: Hot out of the design studio and into your closet, this bag from murcia references the ethnic Indian jhola style bag in its cut and silhouette. It ramps up its fashion quotient with the soft, plush upper. This drool-worthy piece is well-designed to compartmentalise your belongings. Grab one before it's too late! Length: 38 cm Width: 36 cm Depth: 7 cm Two-tone soft, velvety fabric upper Two shoulder straps Branding embossed on the front along with a brand badge One main compartment with a magnetic closure Double-buttoned tab in the middle that can be used in case of additional space requirements Fabric inner with a zippered separator, two pouches and a zippered pocket Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
